DashboardRules.bulkCardDescription: Bought {count}x - consider wholesale instead of retail (-20%)
DashboardRules.insightNoData: Upload receipts to unlock wholesale insights.
DashboardRules.insightNeedsVolume: Bought {count}x so far. We recommend wholesale vs retail after more than 6 purchases.
DashboardRules.insightWholesale: You consume around {monthlyQty} units/month. If you buy a {packQty}-unit wholesale pack instead of retail for {packPrice} ({bulkUnitPrice}/unit), you can save {monthlySaving}/month or {yearlySaving}/year.
DashboardRules.noRecommendationBody: Need more than 6 purchases for this product before we can recommend wholesale.
DashboardRules.allRecommendationsHandledBody: You already acted on all current recommendations. Keep scanning receipts to unlock new opportunities.
DashboardRules.allRecommendationsHandledMeta: {planCount} bulk plans created, {boughtCount} purchases marked as wholesale.
DashboardRules.trustSignal: Based on {count} purchases, avg retail {avgRetail}, assumed wholesale -20%.
